journey.name: Recording Studio
journey.description: Verify that the user can record video using the front-facing camera while following the teleprompter.

actions.action: Adjust the slider to set the Target Duration to about 10s.
Enter "0s-4s: Hello KMP Developers. 4s-10s: This is a sample script." into the Generated Script Content text box.
Tap the "Record" button to proceed to the Recording Studio.
Ensure that the top half of the screen displays the previously saved script.
Check that the bottom half of the screen shows the live front-facing camera view.
Wait for the 5-second countdown to finish.
Verify that the teleprompter advances correctly based on the target duration timestamps and finishes at 15 seconds (given the 5 second buffer the end).
Check that the visual timeline advances automatically counting down the remaining time for the entire video (the duration + 5 second buffer).
When recording completes, verify that navigation option 'Edit' appears.
Tap 'Edit' to advance to the next screen.
Verify that the screen title is now "Editing Studio".
